blurb: The singer lifts his eyes toward the hills, convinced that help is already descending, already crossing the ridge. This is no vague optimism: it is a disciplined willingness to look beyond the next sorrow and name the One who comes. Let your own horizon fill with mercy this morning; wherever trouble waits, the Helper is already closer than the noise of your heart.

verses.text: Joy is of the saints! and who shall put it on, but they alone?
Grace is of the elect! and who shall receive it except those who trust in it from the beginning?
Love is of the elect? And who shall put it on except those who have possessed it from the beginning?
Walk ye in the knowledge of the Most High without grudging: to His exultation and to the perfection of His knowledge.
